name: Wall-A
description: A robotics project — PS5 DualSense controller-driven motor sequences on a custom-built robot platform.

name: Aegis Swarm
description: Autonomous drone swarm system combining real-time computer vision, acoustic triangulation, and coordinated multi-drone engagement.

name: Deno 2D Arm
description: An investigation into forward and inverse kinematics with a 2D robotic arm simulation.

name: Genetic Climbers
description: Genetic algorithm simulation where agents evolve climbing strategies over generations.

name: Calordle
description: Wordle-inspired Angular game for guessing calories in different foods.

name: Diamond Defender
description: A 2D browser game — WASD to move, hold click to fire. Built with TypeScript.

name: Rhyme Calculator
description: Speed project using the Datamuse API to find and graph rhyming words by score.
